title: Cobblemon The Evangelion Add-on
description: This is an Add-on Datapack that's goal is to add all the EVAs and Angels from the hit anime Neon Genesis Evangelion to then further it into a full fledged region.
body:
Welcome to the region of Tokyo-2 where pokemon and people get along perfectly well. At least I wish that were the case. Even since the Second Impact people have been less worried about what is and are more worried about whats to come. The the recent second impact caused by legendary pokemon know as angels has forced people into trying to figure out ways to stop these threats so three groups have arose. SEELE having found the Dead Sea Scrolls looks to use this as a chance to find the lost legendries and unite everyone in instrumentality. EIN trying to do the same only to bring a new world through them to have it so pokemon guide the new world through regained individuality. Finally NERV working on making synthetic pokemon known as Evangelions piloted by Joltiks to stop the lost legendries from reawakening for a third impact. 

Included currently are many region variants which include: 
Gallade/Gardevior line
Joltik
Electrode Line
Dugtrio
Wooper
Piplup line
Treeko line
Froakie line
Metagross line
Regi-Tabeis
And more. 

Angels such as: 
Ramiel
Sahaquiel
Leliel
Sandalphon
Bardiel
Ireul (kind of working out kinks) 

Custom Legends/Myrhics: 
Zohar
Elizrael
Zohar
Aurabunet
